data.title: Battalion Oil Corp ends gas treating agreement, gets new midstream deal, increases production with enhanced gas processing.
data.description: Battalion Oil has ended a gas treating contract and now has a new midstream agreement in place. This move comes as the company aims to enhance its gas processing capacity to increase production.
Randall Wade steps down from Diversified Energy's Board of Directors.

data.title: Canvas Beauty partners with La La Anthony for signature scents collection debuting live on TikTok Shop, Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: Stormi Steele has announced a new collaboration featuring La La Anthony's signature scents, which will be launched on TikTok Shop. The beauty brand, Canvas Beauty, founded by Steele, is set to debut the collaboration. This news was made public in Huntsville, Alabama on January 23, 2026.

data.title: Shincheonji Church condemns S.Korean labeling as "social harm" and "cult." Calls it unconstitutional.
data.description: The Shincheonji Church of Jesus has criticized the South Korean government for publicly branding them as a "social harm," "cult," and "heresy" without completing an investigation. The church contends that these allegations go against Article 20 of the Constitution, which guarantees freedom of religion. The South Korean government's actions have raised concerns among the 200,000 members of the Shincheonji Church of Jesus, who feel unfairly targeted and stigmatized. The church asserts that it is committed to transparently cooperating with authorities to address any concerns, but emphasizes the importance of respecting their religious rights and not jumping to conclusions.

data.title: CertiK considers IPO as valuation reaches $2B, CEO mentions it'll boost Web3 companies significantly at Davos.
data.description: During a speech in Davos, the co-founder and CEO Ronghui Gu announced that a CertiK public listing would mark a major step forward for businesses in the Web3 sector.

data.title: U.S. Hemp Roundtable welcomes Rep. Griffith's Bipartisan HEMP Act for FDA oversight and regulatory framework in hemp industry.
data.description: A bill introduced in January 23, 2026 in Washington aims to provide FDA supervision and enhance consumer safeguards in the U.S. hemp sector. The proposed legislation seeks to bring much-needed regulatory stability to the industry. The U.S. Hemp Roundtable has expressed support for this bill, emphasizing the importance of establishing oversight and ensuring the protection of consumers.

data.title: Top College Cheerleading and Dance Teams shine in 2026 UCA & UDA National Championship events in Memphis. University of Memphis, Alabama excel.
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee on January 23, 2026, Varsity Spirit, a division of Varsity Brands and a prominent figure in cheerleading, dance team, and band apparel, camps, competitions, and yearbooks, has revealed exciting news. The University of Memphis, University of Alabama, and University [unnamed] are part of this announcement.

data.title: EastGroup Properties disclosed the tax treatment of its 2025 distributions in JACKSON, Miss., on Jan. 23, 2026. Shareholders advised to consult tax advisors. Characters: 133
data.description: In Jackson, Mississippi on January 23, 2026, EastGroup Properties, Inc. (NYSE: EGP) disclosed details regarding the income tax implications of its 2025 distributions. Shareholders are advised to seek guidance from their tax advisors for individualized assistance.

data.title: Control Point Associates, Inc. expands with Rouse-Sirine acquisition, boosting office count to 12 in Mid-Atlantic.
data.description: Control Point Associates, Inc. has significantly broadened its land surveying and geospatial capabilities through the recent acquisition of Rouse-Sirine Associates, a Virginia-based company. This move has bolstered Control Point's presence in the Mid-Atlantic region and expanded its total number of offices to 12. The acquisition took place on January 23, 2026, in Warren, New Jersey.

data.title: Frontline plc has secured time charter-out agreements for seven VLCCs at $76,900 per day per vessel starting 2026.
data.description: Frontline plc, trading as FRO on NYSE and OSE, has recently finalized one-year time charter-out contracts for seven of its Very Large Crude Carriers (VLCCs). The agreements are set to begin between late January and April 2026, with each vessel commanding a rate of $76,900 per day.

data.title: BitGo's stock tumbles 22% below IPO price on second trading day in steep decline.
data.description: On its second day of trading following the initial public offering, BitGo's shares experienced a significant decline of almost 22%, dropping below the IPO price.

data.title: Captain D's opens second restaurant in Kent, UK amid successful performance, plans for more locations; ranked #1 in seafood.
data.description: Captain D's, a renowned American seafood and chicken restaurant brand, has seen robust early performance, leading to plans for franchise expansion in the UK. The brand is aiming to establish more locations across the country. Recently named as the top seafood brand, Captain D's is on track to solidifying its presence in the market.

data.title: American Industrial Partners acquires International Paper's Global Cellulose Fibers business. Deal finalized on Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, American Industrial Partners (AIP), an industrials investor, revealed the completion of its acquisition of the Global Cellulose Fibers (GCF) business from International Paper. This move comes as an affiliate of AIP finalizes the transaction. International Paper, listed on the NYSE under IP and the LSE under IPC, sees its GCF business now under new ownership with AIP at the helm.

data.title: Tesla Cybertruck sales dropped by 48% in 2025, prompting expansion to Middle East market with first deliveries in UAE.
data.description: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA), had previously anticipated the Cybertruck to be a leading electric vehicle in terms of sales. However, demand for the Cybertruck significantly decreased in North America, resulting in a sales decline in 2025. To counter this, Tesla started distributing the Cybertruck in its first international market. The company's stock is currently performing well and trading at high levels. Recently, Tesla initiated deliveries of the Cybertruck in the Middle East after opening orders for the region in September. The United Arab Emirates saw the first arrivals of the Tesla vehicle. For more details, visit the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Yottaa launches AI-native MCP server for eCommerce performance, providing real-time data for developers. #TechNews
data.description: A company based in Waltham, Massachusetts has introduced its Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. Yottaa, a prominent cloud platform specializing in enhancing and streamlining eCommerce experiences, has unveiled this server. This move positions Yottaa as the pioneering performance provider in the eCommerce sector to provide AI-native capabilities to access web performance data for developers, engineers, and digital professionals. The MCP server aims to integrate current, organized performance data directly into developer workflows. By leveraging this new server, AI agents and Integrated Development Environments (IDEs) will have the ability to seek real-time data from live production environments.

data.title: Elme Communities updates liquidation progress, 3 properties sold, aiming to close remaining 10 by Q1 2026, projected total distribution of $17.02 - $17.47 per share.
data.description: A company has finalized agreements for the purchase and sale of three out of the ten remaining properties, scheduled to be completed by the first quarter of 2026. The company aims to conclude all outstanding sales by mid-year 2026. The estimated total liquidating distributions have been revised to a range of $17.02 to $17.47 per share, inclusive of the initial $14.67 per share distributed in January 2026.

data.title: Roivant to host conference call on February 6, 2026, to report Q3 financial results ended December 31, 2025.
data.description: Roivant (Nasdaq: ROIV) has revealed plans to hold a live conference call and webcast on Friday, February 6, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. The call will cover the financial results for the second quarter finishing on December 31, 2026. This announcement was made from BASEL, Switzerland, LONDON, and NEW YORK, and aims to offer insight into the company's performance and provide a business update.

data.title: Lake Shore Bancorp declares $0.09 dividend per share on common stock, payable on Feb. 11 to stockholders as of Feb. 2.
data.description: In Dunkirk, NY, on Jan. 23, 2026, Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.09 per share on its common stock (NASDAQ: LSBK) on Jan. 21, 2026. The dividend is set to be paid on Feb. 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of Feb. 2, 2026.

data.title: Black Hills Corp. raises quarterly dividend to $0.703 per share from $0.676, for shareholders of record by Feb. 17.
data.description: Today, Black Hills Corp. (NYSE: BKH) revealed that its board of directors has sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.703 per share, marking a rise of $0.027 per share from the prior quarter. Shareholders registered as of Feb. 17, 2026, will be eligible to obtain $0.703 per share, with the payment scheduled for March 1, 2026.

data.title: Eaton acquires Ultra PCS Limited from Cobham Ultra Group for $1.55 billion, strengthening aerospace solutions.
data.description: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on NYSE as ETN, has recently finalized the acquisition of Ultra PCS Limited from Cobham Ultra Group. This strategic move aims to enhance Eaton's offerings for military and civilian aircraft, particularly in safety and mission critical aerospace systems. The acquisition cost Eaton $1.55 billion. This deal positions Eaton strongly in the aerospace industry, expanding its product portfolio with cutting-edge solutions catered to vital aerospace platforms.
